title: centaurea × maritima
intro: Centaurea × maritima, also known as Centaury, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, combining the characteristics of Centaurea cyanus and Centaurea montana. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent, which help in treating wounds, sore throats, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Centaury include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and provide relief from menstrual cramps. Centaury can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional due to potential interactions with medications.
